message:
bd-3lr7: stabilize e2e_tui pane output assertions

Extract assert_tool_output_visible() helper that checks both numbered
tool-output lines AND raw SAMPLE_FILE_CONTENT words. This prevents
flaky failures when TUI line-number prefixes scroll off-screen or get
reformatted in narrow panes.

Also adds #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] to e2e_tui_vcr_tool_read.

Closes: bd-3lr7, bd-366x

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
